Call ID: EXT-020
Type: external
Date: 2026-05-17
Topic: Renewal Negotiation
Participants: Zara (account manager); Grace (customer)
------------------------------------------------------------
AM (Zara): Hi Grace, thanks for making time today. How are things going on your side?
Customer (Grace): We're up for renewal next month and leadership is scrutinizing every spend.
AM (Zara): I'd love to walk through the value you've realized this year.
Customer (Grace): We've had a mixed experience, to be candid.
AM (Zara): Let's look at your usage — you've grown into a higher tier organically.
Customer (Grace): This was helpful. Let's keep the momentum going.
AM (Zara): Thank you — I'll send a recap with clear next steps and owners by end of day.
